name: useObjectUrl
description: Hook that creates and revokes an object URL for a Blob or MediaSource

parameters.name: object
parameters.description: The object to represent as a URL

source.source: * @param {Blob | MediaSource} object The object to represent as a URL

tokens.name: object
tokens.description: The object to represent as a URL

returns.name: An
returns.description: object with the current object URL
